summary: Tested Petrol Allowance and GPS Mandatory Attendance features. Fixed critical bug: Missing 'Truck' icon import in AccountsBoard.jsx causing runtime error. All features working correctly after fix.

fixed.issue: ReferenceError: Truck is not defined - Missing import for Truck icon from lucide-react

seed_data_creation: Created petrol allowance requests during testing (₹750, ₹500)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Petrol Allowance and GPS Mandatory Attendance features are fully functional. The Truck icon import was missing in AccountsBoard.jsx - this has been fixed. Petrol Allowance tab is inside Petty Cash tab in SE Dashboard. Accountant sees petrol requests in Petty Cash Management view (click on Petty Cash card in Cashbook tab).

petrol_allowance.se_request_petrol_allowance: PASS - SE can submit petrol allowance with Date/Amount/KM
petrol_allowance.se_view_history: PASS - SE can see history with Approved/Pending status badges
petrol_allowance.accountant_view_requests: PASS - Accountant sees pending requests in Petty Cash Management
petrol_allowance.accountant_approve: PASS - Accountant can approve with success toast
petrol_allowance.validation: PASS - Amount and KM required validation working

gps_attendance.login_requires_gps: PASS - Backend rejects login with 0,0 coordinates
gps_attendance.login_with_valid_gps: PASS - Login succeeds with valid coordinates
gps_attendance.gps_warning_in_dialog: PASS - 'GPS must be ON' warning shown in login dialog
gps_attendance.attendance_history: PASS - Shows sessions with login/logout times

regression_petty_cash.petty_cash_summary: PASS - Cash in Hand, Expenses, Pending Req visible

backend_api_tests.POST /api/attendance/login: PASS - Validates GPS, creates attendance record
